title: simply hats
description: a mod that adds a bunch of cosmetic hats!
body:
simply hats is a mod that adds a bunch of different hats, they are all craftable and survivel friendly. the hats also provide 2 armor points that equals to 1.

# very importent! geckolib is needed
![geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fa652970bfa34bf3329f04cb5fe930dd52ad5fc.jpeg)

## [download here:](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)

### join the discord server for anouncments, talks and mod suggestions:
### [discord](https://discord.gg/yj9SQgHr)
### 

![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d31f08f569fa52d64568364c7d6785bfbbdf6e6.jpeg)

## hats:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### red cap:
### crafted with 4 red wool


![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7163a8935184d947c2f1040b4855e5113a27577e.png)


![hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32f058c4d279c5fa676b61c968af3b288b1894c2.png)

### 
### blue cap:
### crafted with 4 blue wool, has an intresting feature the hat is facing backward instead of forward!


![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a502e14ac9eaee42be17dd1cedaad7492ca1dcd.png)


![hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/303b63fc0985ba6e45fb8019c54493a883669783.png)


### propeller hat:
### crafted with 4 white wool, 1 blue dye, 1 red dye, 1 yellow dye, 1 green dye. the recipe is shapeless meaning you can craft it in any way you want


![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e7ce39ec0630968034da4298e09c379dfa4e12b.png)


![hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6da2119183fda7e69f02edd0fc1c4269d3cdd0b.png)


white fancy hat:
crafted with 4 white wool and 1 yellow dye


![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d87022a9f13ff3c78a045e89f1e6ee14dd21a967.png)


![hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af32f8a818f6482bb2ca20cf09104fae95419797.png)


black fancy hat:
crafted with 4 black wool and 1 red dye


![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbfd03c9667446faa750eae9222eb0902982b1db.png)


![hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3680f699bd09b75e140309cda4f5287acc6d2f6f.png)
</details>

hii! thank you for reading the description!
